label: Fixed
items: Plant identification candidates are now labelled with the correct source. Previously, when Pl@ntNet was highly confident and the edge function synthesised the candidate list from its own top matches, every tile incorrectly showed the "Rhozly AI" badge — which made Pl@ntNet look like it wasn't running at all. Tiles now show the "Pl@ntNet" badge when the result came from Pl@ntNet, and "Rhozly AI" when it came from Gemini.

When Pl@ntNet didn't return a confident match for your photo (e.g. low score, image rejected as non-plant, quota exhausted), a small note now explains that the suggestions below are from Rhozly AI instead — so you know Pl@ntNet was tried but couldn't help on this one.

label: Improved
items: Each candidate tile's confidence percentage now shows a tooltip explaining whose confidence it is (Pl@ntNet or Rhozly AI), since they grade slightly differently.
